q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: print statement (line 24) is not dangerous in a test environment

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: stdout output from print is not observable as persistent state after the function returns

mock_guidance.target: Mock the print function or capture stdout during execution of cmd_api_client
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the arguments passed to the print statement on line 24 to verify the api_key is logged in cleartext
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Allow execution to continue without actually writing to stdout
notes: The violation is clear-text logging, so the print call itself must be intercepted to observe the sensitive data flow.
